OutputEvaluationCriteria.description: Base class for all output evaluation criteria.
OutputEvaluationCriteria.title: OutputEvaluationCriteria

evaluatorConfigSchema.description: Configuration for the LLM judge output evaluator.

prompt.default:
As an expert evaluator, analyze the semantic similarity of these JSON contents to determine a score from 0-100. Focus on comparing the meaning and contextual equivalence of corresponding fields, accounting for alternative valid expressions, synonyms, and reasonable variations in language while maintaining high standards for accuracy and completeness. Provide your score with a justification, explaining briefly and concisely why you gave that score.
----
ExpectedOutput:
{{ExpectedOutput}}
----
ActualOutput:
{{ActualOutput}}

target_output_key.description: Key or list of keys to extract output from workload execution

line_by_line_evaluator.description: If True, split output by delimiter and evaluate each line separately
line_by_line_evaluator.title: Line By Line Evaluator

line_delimiter.description: Delimiter to split output when line_by_line_evaluator is True
line_delimiter.title: Line Delimiter
